name: 语法错误固化率 Syntax Error Persistence
desc: 2 of 5 syntax errors persisted across summary.

steps.t: Step 35: 'python -c "...; with open(...) as f: json.dump(...)"' — `with` after `;` invalid in one-liner
Step 38: corrected — split write into separate command, dropped inline `with`
Step 42: get_session_output surfaces 'File "<string>", line 1 ... ^^^^ SyntaxError: invalid syntax' for bbc `with`-oneliner
Step 46: summary / checkpoint think-node (empty action, depth 46)
Step 48: '...; with open(...) as f: json.dump(...)' bbc — same `with`-after-`;` class recurs
Step 49: '...; with open(...) as f: json.dump(...)' argilla — same class recurs again
Step 54: '...; with open(...) as f: json.dump(...)' argilla — class still recurs after summary
